hero.description: Expert in modern architectures (NestJS/React), microservices migration, and AI solutions with RAG. Delivering scalable software for the government and private sectors..

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am passionate about technology with over 5 years of experience transforming complex processes into efficient digital solutions. My approach combines backend robustness with intuitive user experiences, always prioritizing scalability and engineering best practices.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.techtrack_desc: Web app for schools to track and manage technology assets across multiple campuses. Features role-based access, work orders, IT tickets, inventory, finance reports, and QR code generation per asset.
projects.ai_desc: Intelligent query system using RAG and Llama 3 for document analysis.
projects.micro_desc: Scalable microservices architecture for consular traffic management.
